saudacaoInicial: I am a software developer driven by creating innovative and efficient solutions. My goal is to turn ideas into reality through code, building applications that positively impact people's lives. Browse my portfolio to explore my projects and skills.
sejaBemVindo: Welcome to my portfolio. Discover my journey:
minhaTragetoria: years of experience in software development. The ability to build something functional and beautiful from scratch is what drives me as a software developer. My professional journey has been focused on developing robust and scalable web applications, always committed to delivering the best experience for the end user. I believe that collaboration and communication are just as important as well-written code. Therefore, in my projects, I always seek to deeply understand the problem to be solved, working in an agile manner and in sync with the team. I am an enthusiast of development best practices, such as Clean Code and automated testing, as I understand that software quality is fundamental to its long-term success.
tenhoAbordagemAnalitica: I have an analytical approach to decomposing complex problems and designing clean, efficient, and scalable software solutions. I value well-structured code, the application of design patterns, and collaboration to build high-quality products.
desenvolvoLogicaServidor: I develop server logic, security, and the infrastructure that supports applications. I am proficient in building robust and scalable REST APIs using Java.
crioInterfaces: I create fluid and responsive user interfaces with a focus on User Experience (UX). I have solid experience with React.js, transforming complex designs into reusable and performant components.
comunicacaoClaraBase: I believe that clear communication is the foundation of a project's success. I work collaboratively in multidisciplinary teams (developers, designers, PMs), using agile methodologies to align technical objectives with business goals and deliver continuous value.

services.title: End-to-End Solution Development
services.subtitle: As a Full-Stack developer specializing in Spring Boot, React, and Flutter, I excel in crafting robust MVPs and scalable SaaS solutions that address real business challenges. I transform ideas into functional products with quality and agility.

diagnosisForm.title: Strategic Diagnosis
diagnosisForm.description: Fill out the fields below so I can understand your needs and prepare a personalized proposal.

linkedinUrl.description: Optional, but helps to know your professional profile

businessProblem.placeholder: What pain or process do you want to solve/automate?

mustHaveFeatures.label: Must-Have Features
mustHaveFeatures.placeholder: What must the system absolutely have?

howMet.label: How did you hear about me?
howMet.error: Select how you heard about me

diagnosisForm.successMessage: Thank you! I'll get back to you within 48h to schedule an initial alignment meeting.
diagnosisForm.errorMessage: There was a problem submitting the form. Please try again or contact me directly.
diagnosisForm.footerNote: This form is the first step towards a successful project. All information will be treated confidentially.

howWeWork.title: How I Work
howWeWork.description: I execute a transparent and collaborative process, ensuring each step is clear and aligned with your goals.

step2.title: Technical Proposal
step2.description: Detailed scope and timeline delivery within 72h.

step4.title: Handover
step4.description: Training and delivery of all code/system and documentation.

howWeWork.footer: I work with agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban) and keep you updated at each project phase.
